subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the presence of the Self-Subsisting unto them that have believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, that the wine might draw them into rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی القیوم الی الذین آمنوا بالله المهیمن القیوم لیجذبهم سکر خمر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
